title: Amtech L0490 9-in-1 Screwdriver bit Set
availability_text: Only 3 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE: This handy 9-in-1 screwdriver bit set has chrome vanadium steel bits and a strong, light aluminium driver handle with a magnetic tip to hold the bits securely
USEFUL RANGE OF HEADS: With a bit storage facility in the head, the set includes a useful assortment of Phillips, slotted and Torx bits
VERSATILE: It is ideal for use with small electronic components, glasses, jewellery and most mobile phones
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Small electronic components, glasses, jewellery, mobile phones
